description: Fixed a deadlock in TypeScript AppHosts where RunSyncOnBackgroundThread on AspireExport methods was ignored for async-returning exports, causing aspire start/run to hang during startup. A follow-up fix also ensures the Aspire.Hosting/run capability itself opts into RunSyncOnBackgroundThread, preventing a remaining deadlock when async TypeScript callbacks are stored in lazy IOptions.Configure and resolved during BeforeStartEvent.
name: Fix TypeScript AppHost deadlock for async callbacks
